verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Through all the unbelief, Abraham withstood defeat, And he staggered not at the promise of God; But after nine months was through, He still believed God's Word was true. That's when it dropped from his head to his heart.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: When it dropped from his head to his heart That's when the blessings began to start, The revelation came and took control; Oh, it's so much easier to live for Him, And it's easier to conquer sin; That's when it dropped from his head to his heart.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: When God shows me something new And reveals to me what to do Getting it into my head is just the start, But when the Word finally strikes my soul, It changes me from head to toe; That's when it drops from the head to my heart.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: When it drops from my head to my heart That's when the blessings begin to start, The revelation comes and takes control; Oh, it's so much easier to live for Him, And it's easier to conquer sin; That's when it drops from my head to my heart.
